name: tripsplit
description: TripSplit — Telegram Mini App for splitting travel expenses (monorepo root)

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=shared && concurrently -n shared,server,web -c "#8E8E93,#31B545,#3390EC" "npm run build:watch --workspace=shared" "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.json --noEmit
